projects.label: CHASM
projects.desc: Severe malaria pathophysiology in children: cerebral malaria, severe malarial respiratory distress, thrombocytopenia; biomarkers, proteomics, clinical phenotyping (echocardiography, fundoscopy, ultrasound), mechanistic endotyping.

projects.label: Computer Vision
projects.desc: Machine-learning image analysis for malaria: automated microscopy or blood-smear parasite detection, deep learning on images, smartphone or automated image-based diagnosis.

projects.label: Forecasting
projects.desc: Predictive modeling of malaria burden or transmission using machine-learning/statistics on climate, environmental, or surveillance data; AI tools for surveillance and targeted control.

projects.label: Genomics
projects.desc: Plasmodium parasite genomics: whole-genome sequencing, genetic diversity and population structure, drug-resistance markers (kelch13, pfmdr1, etc.), molecular/genomic epidemiology.

projects.label: ICEMR
projects.desc: Longitudinal malaria epidemiology and surveillance (especially Zambia): parasite prevalence, entomology, reactive case detection, household risk factors, transmission, vaccine implementation.

projects.label: IMPRINT
projects.desc: Malaria and the gut microbiome: metagenomics/metabolomics, how microbiome composition affects antimalarial drug absorption or efficacy and malaria pathogenesis.

projects.label: MACEPA
projects.desc: Pharmacokinetic/pharmacodynamic studies of antimalarials (especially piperaquine), dried-blood-spot sampling and PKPD modeling, partnership with national malaria control programs.

projects.label: MARSHAL
projects.desc: Retrospective hospital-records (case-control) studies of malaria presentations and outcomes (mortality, comorbidities, nutrition) in low-resource settings.

projects.label: PDMC
projects.desc: Post-discharge malaria chemoprevention: preventive antimalarial dosing after hospitalization for severe malaria or severe anemia; efficacy, safety, adherence, cost-effectiveness, prevention of recurrent malaria and readmission.

projects.label: PharCide
projects.desc: Randomized trials comparing antimalarials (e.g. artemether-lumefantrine vs dihydroartemisinin-piperaquine) in children with uncomplicated falciparum malaria; parasite clearance, recrudescence, treatment failure.

projects.label: Pharmacokinetics
projects.desc: Antimalarial drug pharmacokinetics/pharmacodynamics: drug concentrations, absorption/metabolism, PK modeling, exposure-response relationships.

projects.label: PLATFORM
projects.desc: Trial of whole-blood transfusion for severe malaria with thrombocytopenia in children; mortality outcomes and platelet-activation biomarkers.

projects.label: Serology
projects.desc: Malaria seroepidemiology: seroprevalence and antibody dynamics to Plasmodium antigens (MSP-1, AMA-1), age/seasonal patterns, force of infection, transmission intensity.

projects.label: VSA
projects.desc: Variant surface antigens (VSA): PfEMP1 diversity and var genes, VSA expression and host immune responses, especially in severe/cerebral malaria; systematic reviews/meta-analyses of VSA.
